productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Red T-shirt
description: Composition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a diagonal panel stitch stripe and embroidered branding on the left chest Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The diagonal panel stitch on the front pays tribute to classic sport fashion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with denims, a tonal jacket and canvas shoes. Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
